positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a leaping golden retriever in mid-air, silhouette against a vibrant, abstract watercolor sky of sapphire blue, coral orange, and sage green. The dog is perfectly poised and dynamic, giving the sense of joyful freedom. Composition should be centered and highly scalable. Use bold, clean lines and strong contrast. Stylize the style as modern, retro-inspired flat design with high visual punch, suitable for DTG print on apparel. High detail, ultra-definition, perfect symmetry.
